summary: Implemented Indexer class for opencode-codebase-memory with incremental change detection via SHA256 content hashing. Walks directory trees, skips IGNORE_DIRS (node_modules, .git, dist, etc.), indexes supported JS/TS files via parser, stores nodes/edges/files in GraphStore. Re-indexing unchanged files is skipped. 5 tests covering directory indexing, incremental skip, modified file re-index, IGNORE_DIRS filtering, and getStats.
